code: import React from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import'./MangaCard.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const formatNumber=function(){let num=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:0;if(num>=1000000)return"".concat((num/1000000).toFixed(1),"M");if(num>=1000)return"".concat((num/1000).toFixed(1),"K");return String(num);};const MangaCard=_ref=>{let{manga}=_ref;const isVideo=manga.contentType==='video'||String(manga.type||'').toLowerCase()==='video';const chapterCount=Array.isArray(manga.chapters)?manga.chapters.length:Number(manga.chapters||0);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/content/".concat(manga.id),className:"manga-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card-image",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:manga.cover,alt:manga.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"image-overlay",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"overlay-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-play"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:isVideo?'Watch':'Read'})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card-badge",children:manga.type||manga.category})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"card-title",children:manga.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"card-author",children:manga.author}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card-stats",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-star"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:manga.rating||0})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas ".concat(isVideo?'fa-video':'fa-book')}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:isVideo?'Video':"".concat(chapterCount," ch.")})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-eye"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:formatNumber(manga.views||0)})]})]})]})]});};export default MangaCard;
